task_completion.description: ProjectLibre is open with the project loaded
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ProjectLibre application window is visible and a project schedule is displayed in the main view.

task_completion.description: The target anchor task is located in the task list
task_completion.visual_evidence: The task 'Strip column piers and foundation forms' (typically around row 44) is visible in the Name column of the task spreadsheet.

task_completion.description: A new task row is inserted immediately after the anchor task
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new task row exists directly below 'Strip column piers and foundation forms'.

task_completion.description: The new task is correctly named
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Name column for the newly inserted task contains exactly 'Foundation Work Complete'.

task_completion.description: The new task is set as a milestone with 0 days duration
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Duration column for 'Foundation Work Complete' shows '0 days' or '0d', and/or a milestone icon (typically a black diamond) is visible for this row in the Gantt chart.
The agent clicks the Save icon (floppy disk) in the toolbar, or uses the File -> Save menu, or there is no unsaved indicator (like an asterisk) in the window title bar after modifications.

integrity.description: The agent used the ProjectLibre GUI to modify the project
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the ProjectLibre interface (menus, spreadsheet, toolbar) rather than a terminal or text editor modifying the underlying XML file.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine ProjectLibre application
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window has the standard ProjectLibre layout, icons, and Gantt chart view.

integrity.description: No unrelated tasks were modified or deleted
integrity.visual_evidence: Other tasks in the project, particularly those around row 44, remain intact and unchanged.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must create a new task named 'Foundation Work Complete' with a duration of 0 days. This task must be inserted immediately after the existing task 'Strip column piers and foundation forms' (which corresponds to task UID 44). The project file is located at /home/ga/Projects/current_task.xml.
